prompt: I built a prompt that summarizes customer support emails into 3 bullet points for my team. It seems to work when I try it. How do I make sure it's actually good before my team starts relying on it? Set up whatever is needed.
assertions: Quality is framed as a measured rate across a case set — explicitly rejects the single-trial anecdote
A case set of roughly 20 cases exists with a deliberate mix of typical, hard, and hostile cases
Pass criteria are defined per case BEFORE outputs are generated/graded
Hostile/adversarial cases include at least prompt injection and empty/misdirected input
Regression discipline prescribed: rerun the FULL set after any prompt or model change
If an LLM judge is used: it has a written rubric, blind grading, and a human spot-check/calibration requirement
